	+(INTEGER, DATE) -> DATE
	+(INTERVAL, INTERVAL) -> INTERVAL
	+(DATE, INTERVAL) -> TIMESTAMP
	+(INTERVAL, DATE) -> TIMESTAMP
	+(TIME, INTERVAL) -> TIME
	+(INTERVAL, TIME) -> TIME
	+(TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL) -> TIMESTAMP
	+(INTERVAL, TIMESTAMP) -> TIMESTAMP
	+(TIME WITH TIME ZONE, INTERVAL) -> TIME WITH TIME ZONE
	+(INTERVAL, TIME WITH TIME ZONE) -> TIME WITH TIME ZONE
	+(TIME, DATE) -> TIMESTAMP
	+(DATE, TIME) -> TIMESTAMP
	+(TIME WITH TIME ZONE, DATE) -> TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE
	+(DATE, TIME WITH TIME ZONE) -> TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE
	+([ANY[]...]) -> ANY[]
	+(BIGNUM, BIGNUM) -> BIGNUM
	+(TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, INTERVAL) -> TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE
	+(INTERVAL, TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE) -> TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE

Kql: print d = dynamic([{"v":1},{"v":2},{"v":3},{"v":4}]) | mv-apply e = d on (where toint(e.v) % 2 == 0 | summarize evensum = sum(toint(e.v))) | project evensum
Sql: SELECT evensum FROM (SELECT t.*, _sub.* FROM (SELECT LIST_VALUE('{"v":1}'::JSON, '{"v":2}'::JSON, '{"v":3}'::JSON, '{"v":4}'::JSON) AS d) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(d) AS u(value), LATERAL (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(e, '$.v') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(e, '$.v') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS evensum FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT u.value AS e) WHERE (((TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(e, '$.v') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(e, '$.v') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER)) % NULLIF(2, 0)) + ABS(2)) % NULLIF(2, 0) = 0)) AS _sub)
Detail: row count: kusto=1 duck=4

Kql: print s = '{"deep":[[[1]],[[2],[3]]]}' | extend d = parse_json(s) | project l1 = array_length(d.deep), inner = d.deep[1], deepval = toint(d.deep[1][0][0]), deepval2 = toint(d.deep[1][1][0])
Sql: SELECT LEN(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.deep'), '$[*]')) AS l1, json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.deep'), '$[' || (1) || ']') AS "inner", TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(json_extract(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.deep'), '$[' || (1) || ']'), '$[' || (0) || ']'), '$[' || (0) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(json_extract(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.deep'), '$[' || (1) || ']'), '$[' || (0) || ']'), '$[' || (0) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS deepval, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(json_extract(json_extract(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.deep'), '$[' || (1) || ']'), '$[' || (1) || ']'), '$[' || (0) || ']') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(json_extract(json_extract(json_extract(json_extract(d, '$.deep'), '$[' || (1) || ']'), '$[' || (1) || ']'), '$[' || (0) || ']') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS deepval2 FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(s AS JSON) AS d FROM (SELECT '{"deep":[[[1]],[[2],[3]]]}' AS s))

Kql: print d = dynamic({"a":1,"b":"text","c":true,"d":[1,2],"e":{"f":3},"g":null}) | extend j = dynamic_to_json(d) | extend rt = parse_json(j) | project jt = j, dlen = array_length(bag_keys(d)), rtlen = array_length(bag_keys(rt))
Sql: SELECT j AS jt, LEN(JSON_KEYS(d)) AS dlen, LEN(JSON_KEYS(rt)) AS rtlen FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(j AS JSON) AS rt FROM (SELECT *, CAST(d AS JSON) AS j FROM (SELECT '{"a":1,"b":"text","c":true,"d":[1,2],"e":{"f":3},"g":null}'::JSON AS d)))

Kql: print d = dynamic([1.5, 2.5, 3.5]) | extend s = array_sum(d), srt = array_sort_desc(d) | mv-expand v = d to typeof(real) | summarize total = sum(v), maxv = max(v)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS total, MAX(v) AS maxv FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM (SELECT *, LIST_SUM(d) AS s, LIST_REVERSE_SORT(d) AS srt FROM (SELECT LIST_VALUE(1.5, 2.5, 3.5) AS d)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(d) AS u(value))

Kql: print x = dynamic([[1,"a"],[2,"b"],[3,"c"]]) | mv-expand pair = x | project num = toint(pair[0]), letter = tostring(pair[1]) | summarize make_list(num), make_list(letter)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(LIST(num) FILTER (WHERE num IS NOT NULL), []) AS list_num, COALESCE(LIST(letter) FILTER (WHERE letter IS NOT NULL), []) AS list_letter FROM (SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(pair[0 + 1] AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(pair[0 + 1] AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS num, TRY_CAST(pair[1 + 1] AS TEXT) AS letter FROM (SELECT t.*, u.value AS pair FROM (SELECT LIST_VALUE('[1,"a"]'::JSON, '[2,"b"]'::JSON, '[3,"c"]'::JSON) AS x) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(x) AS u(value)))

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic, w:long)[ dynamic([1,2,3]),2, dynamic([4,5]),3 ] | mv-expand v = d to typeof(long) | extend weighted = v * w | summarize sum(weighted) by wt = w | sort by wt asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT w AS wt, COALESCE(SUM(weighted), 0) AS sum_weighted FROM (SELECT *, v * w AS weighted FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS BIGINT) AS v FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (LIST_VALUE(1, 2, 3), CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (LIST_VALUE(4, 5), CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(d, w)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(d) AS u(value))) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY wt ASC NULLS FIRST
